(。ò∀ó。)","text_exts":[{"e":37,"s":34,"text":"美强惨","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BE%8E%E5%BC%BA%E6%83%A8&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265392C9C65030%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227455658403128509246%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227438614368259951641%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BE%8E%E5%BC%BA%E6%83%A8%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735910951,"group_id":"7438614368259951641","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"T_T","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+74vL8XJlcPYwONn61TwQZsiAroXaKzWtPec6HVM1Ze","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e8e121141b8f4a51a4d3cc5845986c2b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791789&x-signature=BWfZR0%2FZf5Xej4sNDS9Z4Ba6GG4%3D","user_id":"3078262145687784","user_name":"ID竺"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3078262145687784","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438614368259951641","book_info":{"abstract":"【才刚出评分所以还不高。双男主+电竞+救赎向+美强惨 受 × 正道的光 攻】 
　　游野自幼命贱如草。
　　两年前，他从SFS新秀赛脱颖而出，被选进了业内号称梦之队的GR战队。
　　本以为人生终于触底反弹，否极泰来了。
　　哪知一场车祸，梦之队团灭。
　　一夕梦碎，他成了电竞圈里赫赫有名的灾星。
　　原本以为的否极泰来，只不过是一个天崩开局的序曲而已。
　　从那之后，游野消失两年，直到晏枭出现在他租屋门口，对他说，“回来打职业，我不会等你太久。”
　　有人问晏枭，就不怕游野的霉运克他们战队吗？毕竟有前车之鉴。
　　晏枭：“不怕，我命硬。”
　　再后来，偶然又有人问起这个话题。
　　晏枭冷峻的眸子有些温柔：“霉运倒不怕，但的确是越来越被他克得死死的了……”
　　游野本以为自己烂命一条，除了孤独终老，不会有第二个结局。
　　哪知天不薄他，给了一个晏枭。不仅要当他队友，还要当他男朋友。
       （游戏设定及赛制均为作者编的，不玩游戏也不影响阅读）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e170f7b45fa5388bf6ebcbcb2b338f18","author":"顾莫宁","author_id":"","book_id":"7438614368259951641","book_name":"电竞：队内恋爱指南","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":509,"name":"游戏主播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=509&name=游戏主播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7438614371644736025","read_count":"12949","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"547355"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"258","tags":"双男主,电竞,游戏主播,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f68e1e44f4093dcc65cabf37aa057073~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449392&x-signature=W1o5pIZdlmWw3JBC2s4Zfc45YBY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3248428156460348","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"80"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231929524C6FCAE40F51C9C65030"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":31,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13519,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":33511},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7556847899412677401","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看 总的来说：
喜欢直掰弯给我看，喜欢电竞给我看，喜欢长嘴给我看
对于游野来说晏枭是救赎也是希望，一会笑一会哭，作者文笔很好不是一般的好，主cp和副cp都很好，所有人都乘乘的，晏枭像一道光，把游野带了出来，剧情很好，还有章弥bdhs，那个什么甲方太子爷（忘了名字存在感太低）bdhs
我好久没看长文章了，不喜欢啰哩巴嗦的剧情，但是这个文章让人欲罢不能根本停不下来，都给我来看！","text_exts":[{"e":183,"s":177,"text":"根本停不下来","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%B9%E6%9C%AC%E5%81%9C%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%8B%E6%9D%A5&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265392C9C65030%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227556847899412677401%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227438614368259951641%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%B9%E6%9C%AC%E5%81%9C%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%8B%E6%9D%A5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759468767,"group_id":"7438614368259951641","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱摆烂一切随缘 祝大家天天开心","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N42hsqF2WS5H8d/hwh1f9foU73c5hEvYh1I0oNZr87FK","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f2f7561d87d04864a95e0ac026431267~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788960&x-signature=wO0XOcidNI%2FjpskARdIEDIJ%2F0sU%3D","user_id":"3109846722559099","user_name":"忆年安"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3109846722559099","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438614368259951641","book_info":{"abstract":"【才刚出评分所以还不高。双男主+电竞+救赎向+美强惨 受 × 正道的光 攻】

真不吹 我看书真的很挑剔 这个故事真的很OK了 不愧能这么高的分 真的很值得 家人们可以放心入好吧(˃ ⌑ ˂ഃ )
1.故事题材新颖(•̀ᴗ•́)و:游戏内容是作者新编的一个游戏 OK看的我很爽
2.人设清晰:完全没有崩人设啊 ①受就是内种很没有安全感 认为别人怎么样都是自己的错 而且写文过程中真的有体现出来 ②攻就是特别特别特别宠！！！٩(๑•̀ω•́๑)۶完全完全没有崩人设③各种小人物描写的也很好 比如性子急的内个队友 是真的有细致的描写出来 每个人都有闪光点的啊！！！ヾ(´〇｀)ﾉ♪♪♪
3.各种小小的CP也很戳我:①两个欢喜经理的极限拉扯！！！②还有毛毛和骆队 虽然没有明确表示 但是真的很好嗑好不好！！！！(๑♡ω♡๑)
4.可能需要提升的就是文笔描写吧？其实我感觉文笔描写也挺好的 òᆺó 最恨的一点就是为什么这么早看到 还没完结啊喂(=ＴェＴ=) 我真的很着急啊啊啊啊啊
不是托哈 就是很好 我很🈵意(„ಡωಡ„) 信女在这里许下心愿 希望可以看到这种文章 真的🆗(*´・ｖ・)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738909952,"group_id":"7438614368259951641","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生的容错率大到超乎你的想象","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N11qDFZt2OI5IPDJiOzd2+Q=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/142cbe6ab6f84962a372ca6521f95259~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790243&x-signature=oS0%2BqkLxoeCzAtCPZttnSthlVHo%3D","user_id":"360255833512925","user_name":"树烨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"360255833512925","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1742575702,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438614368259951641","book_info":{"abstract":"【才刚出评分所以还不高。双男主+电竞+救赎向+美强惨 受 × 正道的光 攻】
